verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All that I am is Yours All that I have is Yours I give You my heart and soul Lord, I'm Yours

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord everyday is Yours Lord every breath is Yours I'm giving my life to You Lord I'm Yours

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You alone are worthy of all praise You alone are worthy of all praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I surrender all to You I surrender all to You I am nothing without You Jesus Christ, take my life It's all for You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You're worthy of all praise You're worthy of all praise Jesus
